meta.title: OffMarket Phuket — Distress & Resale Properties Below Market Price
meta.description: Exclusive distress and resale properties in Phuket. Assignments from owners at below-market prices. For brokers and buyers.

hero.title: Distress & Resale Properties in Phuket
hero.subtitle: Assignments from owners at below-market prices. Ready units and under construction — verified by our analysts.

stats.ctaBottomSub: Browse our curated selection of distress and resale properties in Phuket's top locations.

items.title: Below Market Price
items.desc: Prices lower than the developer — especially in popular locations and complexes.

items.title: Scarce Units
items.desc: Units that are no longer available from the developer — previously sold out at launch.

items.title: Ready to Move In
items.desc: Ideal for buyers looking for immediate occupancy — no construction risk.

items.title: Verified by Analysts
items.desc: Each property comes with a competitive analysis, market benchmarks, and rental yield data.

items.title: Transparent Returns
items.desc: Real performance data, not promises — proven rental income and occupancy rates.

items.title: Sold-Out Projects
items.desc: A rare chance to buy into projects that are fully sold out by the developer.

about.title: About Us
about.description: We specialize in off-market and distress real estate deals in Phuket.

items.title: Expert Analytics
items.desc: Detailed analysis for every property: competitive pricing, market benchmarks, rental yield — all backed by real data.

items.title: Viewing Organization
items.desc: We book and conduct viewings, coordinate with owners, and answer all client questions.

items.title: Local Presence
items.desc: Our team is on the ground in Phuket, Samui, and Pattaya — real local expertise.

items.title: Concierge Service
items.desc: Airport pickup, hotel booking, property tours — the client just needs to choose.

items.title: Turnkey Deals
items.desc: Full support through closing: lawyers, paperwork, payments, registration — all under control.
